heading: Step 3: Remove the service account.
body:
- Click the Trash icon under **Actions**
  to the right of the service account you want to remove from
  the project.

- Click **Remove from this project**.

> **Important:** The service account still exists in the organization and any existing
> credentials remain active until expired or manually revoked.

You can use the Atlas Administration API to [remove
a service account from a project](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-deleteprojectserviceaccount).

To delete an API key for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas projects apiKeys delete <ID> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas projects apiKeys delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-projects-apiKeys-delete).

To delete an API (Application Programming Interface) key from a project using the Atlas UI:
